section_anchor: The DCS profile and why it fell out of rotation
brief_summary: Two DCS-profile keycap silhouettes drawn side by side at consistent scale — DCS on the left with steep cylindrical sidewalls, approximately 11mm tall, profile ridge traced in ochre; Cherry profile on the right, approximately 8mm tall with a shallower scoop and gentler sidewall angle. Both in warm-grey stroke with labels below. Illustrates the height and sculpt differential described in the article body.
